channel.title: Stress on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Stress on PepsFeeder

item.title: Kind Thoughts Strategy: How to Become Tolerant of the Unknown
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: In March, I asked on social networks what was the most difficult for people during the COVID-19 pandemic. I got more than 100 answers and found that in many ways people have the same problem: the unknown.

item.title: Psychological Resilience and Personal Growth: Why Discomfort, Boundaries, and Emotional Intelligence Shape a Better Life - Part 1
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: How stress and pressure can change our lives for the better Tensions became a common feature in the 21st century, causing a mental health crisis, and science suggests that it affected unborn babies.
